reviews.author: Steven Rostedt
reviews.summary: Requested the patch author to resend the patch as a normal patch so it can be picked up by patchwork.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, 13 May 2026 13:24:45 -0400
Rik van Riel <riel@surriel.com> wrote:

> From 9de86227b917c49315b7b67aac3a83afae8d792d Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
> From: Rik van Riel <riel@meta.com>
> Date: Sat, 25 Apr 2026 03:33:54 -0700
> Subject: [PATCH] perf/ftrace: Fix WARNING in __unregister_ftrace_function
> 

Can you resend this as a normal patch so that it can be picked up by patchwork.

Otherwise it will be ignored.

Thanks,

-- Steve

2026-05-13.patch_summary: Patch fixes a WARNING in __unregister_ftrace_function by checking if the ftrace_ops is enabled before unregistering.

reviews.author: Masami Hiramatsu (Google)
reviews.summary: Identified the warning issue in __unregister_ftrace_function and confirmed that the patch fixes it. Acknowledged the fix and added an Acked-by tag.

2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch fixes a warning in the perf/ftrace code by adding a check to ensure that the ftrace_ops is enabled before attempting to unregister it.
